color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
token-per-watt-per-user lever:
route each token to the cheapest
tier that can do the step

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 66, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TINY model -- CPU/DRAM (no HBM tier)
10x stewards, rung-0/1 pre-flight,
vDSO-class deterministic adjudication,
classifiers -- high-volume bookkeeping

div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SMALL model -- GPU
agentic tool-calling hot path
(the scoped workload)

div.style: color: rgb(63, 36, 102) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
FRONTIER model -- GPU/HBM
only the few steps that
genuinely need it

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
syscall signal:
blocked on a slow tool call?
